title: 3DModels
description: 3D models of many items, tools, and weapons. And many more to come!! (WIP)
body:
A WIP Resource Pack that adds 3D models for most of the tools and weapons (Might add some items in the future as well). Just started on it so dont expect much to be in it currently.
Custom Custom model names

![look at all these models!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212e397688df3af4d50c156bf749252a02f29f83.png)

Hammer mace names: Judge, Crucible, Big Boi..

The "unfamiliar" sword names: Executioner, Infinity Sword, Sword of the Cosmos
